---
title: "About Me"
subtitle: "Data Science & Software Engineering Portfolio"
---

<div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 30px;">

<img src="images/profile.jpg" width="200" style="border-radius: 12px;"/>

<div>

# Joshua Macias

Software Engineering student with a Data Science minor, focused on building real world solutions through data analysis, visualization, and software development.

I have experience working with large datasets, creating dashboards, and improving data integrity. I enjoy turning complex data into clear insights that help teams make better decisions.

</div>
</div>

---

## What I Do

- Data Analysis and Visualization (Power BI, Python, R)
- Software Development (C++, C#, JavaScript)
- Database Management (SQL, Firestore)
- Dashboard Design and Reporting
- Data Cleaning and Validation

---

## Current Focus

Right now I am focused on improving my skills in machine learning, full stack development, and building real projects that combine software engineering with data science.

---

## Projects

You can explore my work in the sections above:
- Data Cleansing
- Data Exploration
- Storytelling
- Machine Learning
- Full Stack

---

## Contact

- Email: joshuamm@hotmail.es  
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/joshua-macias-01655017a/  
- GitHub: https://github.com/joshuaamacias
